title: Family and relationships
explanation:
Family and relationships

  • parents — mother and father
  • siblings — brothers and sisters
  • grandparents — grandmother and grandfather
  • partner / husband / wife
  • colleague — person you work with
  • neighbour — person who lives near you

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: My father's brother is my ____. | *uncle | aunt | cousin
My mother's mother is my ____. | *grandmother | granddaughter | niece
She lives with her ____ and two children. | *husband | nephew | colleague
Tom is my best ____. We play together every day. | *friend | neighbour | parent

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option to complete these sentences. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: My ____ live in the same city as me. | parents
My ____ works in the same office. | colleague
My ____ is my mother's sister. | aunt

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: My father's daughter is my ____. | *sister | uncle | nephew
My brother's son is my ____. | *nephew | niece | cousin
They are a happy ____. | *family | colleague | neighbour
She is married — her ____ is a doctor. | *husband | sibling | grandparent
